c._note: c-regime: stable, sustained dynamics. Sage green, solid circle. Think: lasing laser, beating heart.

s._note: s-regime: critical, metastable, SOC. Warm amber (Stone family), diamond. Think: glass at T_g, surface code at threshold.

r._note: r-regime: relaxed, bath equilibrium. Slate blue (Sideris family), downward triangle. Think: dead laser, thermal bath.

k_frust._note: Frustrated topology, no Lyapunov. Muted magenta cross with hatching. Renders as torn surface in 3D.

out_of_scope._note: Framework silent. Muted grey, 45-degree hatching. Never smooth-extrapolated.

posit_grade._note: Depends on unverified posit. Muted violet, dashed. Carries explicit uncertainty band.

numerical_miss._note: Topology matches, values off. Ghost-locus drawn at fitted values alongside predicted.

topological_miss._note: Wrong shape. Highlighted in error color with residual annotation.

out_of_scope._note: Region rendered as hatched, with explicit 'framework silent here' label.

posit_grade_pending._note: Dashed line plus uncertainty band. Tooltip explains which posit is load-bearing.

_design_notes.aesthetic_reference: LIGO control rooms, Mathematica notebooks, JWST data releases — serious scientific instruments, not corporate dashboards. Imbric Systems brand: restrained, painterly, earth-toned.
core_commitments: Dark by default; light theme available but the instrument's natural habitat is dark.
Every regime distinguishable by shape AND color (color-blind safety).
Out-of-scope and posit-grade regions are visually distinct from confident predictions — non-negotiable.
Animations are considered, not gratuitous. Every transition has a budget.
Math typography (KaTeX) appears wherever an equation does.
Code never hardcodes a visual value. theme.json is the single source of truth.
